steps.name: code_changes
steps.acceptance: Causal mask bug fixed in src/model.py (strictly causal). PAD_TOKEN_IDX=4 added to src/data.py. Query zeroing added to TarFlowBlock. Gaussian noise function added to src/data.py. n_atom_types=5 when use_pad_token=True. Config integration in src/train.py. All unit tests pass.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic run (500 steps, ethanol, Config A + causal mask fix + no clamping). Report written to reports/diagnostic_report.md. Finding: log_det/dof explodes to 12.97 at step 500. VF=0%. Log-det exploitation runaway. SANITY fix: alpha_pos=1.0 for 4-config ablation.

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: OPTIMIZE Plan Sub-report approved by Postdoc. Written to reports/plan_report.md.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 4-config 2x2 factorial ablation (1000 steps each, ethanol). Any config achieves VF > 0.40 on ethanol.

result.note: All VF=0. PAD token and query zeroing have zero effect on log-det exploitation. SANITY FAILS.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.reason: SANITY val failed promising criterion (all VF=0). No config to sweep.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.reason: SANITY val failed. No full run warranted.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: HEURISTICS validation run. Masked LayerNorm replaced by log_det_reg_weight=2.0 (Andrade et al. 2024). VF > 0 on ethanol.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep completed; best config selected.

result.note: Best VF=4.7% at 3000 steps. Far below 40% criterion. All runs plateau at step 500.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.reason: Sweep failed promising criterion (best VF=4.7%, criterion 40%). No full run warranted.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.reason: SCALE skipped: failure is training objective equilibrium (log_det_dof ≈ 1/(2*reg_weight) regardless of capacity). Larger model converges to same equilibrium. Confirmed by hyp_003/004 precedent.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report written to reports/final_report.md.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_005; pre-merge checks pass.
